creator: muir@idiom.com
text:
There are errors from cpio. 

	There are errors from scripts: cd: can't cd to /usr/src

	There are errors from gzip: decompression OK, trailing garbage ignored

	At one point it said it was out of disk space.  My configuration:
	10MB / and 343 MB /usr.  Should be enough for everything I think.

	Etc.

How-To-Repeat: 	
	Install 950210-SNAP via ftp.  Install everything.  Watch
	the transfers and the unpacking.
